creator: mnorwick@centurytel.net
text:
See PR.144873 and PR 147290

Trying to do portupgrade -a, when the build gets to graphiz the configuration runs over and over again until it errors out.  There does not appear to be anything useful in the error messages.  Dependencies jack, jackit, Devil, doxygen and SDL also appear as 'not found'.  Building graphiz from the /usr/ports/graphics/graphiz directory after 'make clean' offer the same results.  'make rmconfig' in the /usr/ports/graphics/graphviz directory is also no help.

How-To-Repeat: Run 'portupgrade -a' again.
